---
name: grill-me
description: Interview the user one question at a time to stress-test a plan or design and converge on clear decisions. Use when the user wants to challenge assumptions or says grill me.
---

# grill-me

## Quick Start

Use this skill to challenge a plan before implementation.

## Workflow

1. Ask one sharp question at a time.
2. For each question, include a recommended answer and the tradeoff.
3. Cover scope, constraints, edge cases, security, operability, and rollback.
4. If a question can be answered by inspecting the repository, inspect instead of guessing.
5. Continue until decision branches are resolved or the user stops.

## References

Consult `GOVERNANCE.md`, `.github/copilot-instructions.md`, and `docs/decisions/` for context.
